channel.title: codewars on Writing about past times
channel.description: Recent content in codewars on Writing about past times

item.title: codewars
item.description: codewars Highest and Lowest In this little assignment you are given a string of space separated numbers, and have to return the highest and lowest number. Example: Kata.HighAndLow("1 2 3 4 5"); // return "5 1" Kata.HighAndLow("1 2 -3 4 5"); // return "5 -3" Kata.HighAndLow("1 9 3 4 -5"); // return "9 -5" Notes: All numbers are valid Int32, no need to validate them. There will always be at least one number in the input string.
